identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a high-precision, industrial-grade interface for milk product manufacturing. Reject generic SaaS trends; embrace 'Clinical Brutalism'—clean, sharp, and data-first.
core_principles: Hygiene over Hype: The interface must feel 'sterilized'—high white space, crisp borders.
Data Density: Supervisors need to see batch numbers, fat %, and SNF % instantly. No massive padding in tables.
Input Ergonomics: Forms are the core workhorse. They must be keyboard-friendly and clearly labeled.
Role Clarity: Admin views differ significantly from Supervisor views.

theme.reasoning: Light mode aligns with 'dairy', 'hygiene', and 'cleanliness'. Dark mode feels too software-centric/crypto for a milk factory floor.

primary.name: Industrial Blue
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key text

headings.usage: Page titles, card headers, metric values

body.usage: Table data, form labels, general text

areas.sidebar: fixed left-0 w-64 h-full hidden md:block
areas.header: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-sm shadow-sm font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-sm

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-sm p-5
cards.header: border-b border-slate-100 pb-3 mb-4 font-semibold text-slate-800

forms.input: bg-white border-slate-300 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 rounded-sm h-10
forms.label: text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1.5 block

tables.header: bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 text-xs uppercase font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-left border-b border-slate-200

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_DEPENDENCIES: `npm install lucide-react recharts clsx tailwind-merge @radix-ui/react-slot @radix-ui/react-dialog @radix-ui/react-label @radix-ui/react-select` (and other shadcn deps as needed).
FONT_SETUP: Add '@font-face' or import Google Fonts for 'Manrope' and 'IBM Plex Sans' in `index.css`. Set them as font-sans and font-mono in tailwind config.
LAYOUT: Use a Sidebar Layout for the Dashboard. Top bar for User Profile/Logout. Sidebar for Navigation.
FORMS: Batch Entry is the most critical feature. Split it into clear sections: 'Milk Intake', 'Additives', 'Output'. Use a multi-column grid for inputs to save vertical space.
REPORTS: Use clean tables with 'Download Excel' button (functionality can be mocked or implemented with `xlsx` library).
TESTING: Add `data-testid` to EVERY interactive element (buttons, inputs, menu items).
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds.
Do not use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl; stick to rounded-sm or rounded-md.
Inputs must have clearly defined borders.
Ensure high contrast for all text (WCAG AA).
Mock API calls if backend is not ready, but structure the frontend data models to match the problem statement.
